zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Champernon於1289年出生在英國英格蘭戴文易爾福拉可姆時，她的父親William Champernon60歲，母親Joan de Ferrers36歲。她於1307年與Otto de Bodrugan在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年1月7日在她的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Champernon于1289年出生在英国英格兰戴文易爾福拉可姆时，她的父亲William Champernon60岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers36岁。她于1307年与Otto de Bodrugan在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年1月7日在她的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Champernon was born in 1289, in Ilfracombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Champernon, was 60 and her mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 36. She married Otto de Bodrugan in 1307, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 7 January 1360, in her hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Champernon est née en 1289, à Ilfracombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Champernon, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Otto de Bodrugan en 1307, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1360, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Champernon 1289 in Ilfracombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Champernon 60 und ihre Mutter Joan de Ferrers 36. Sie hat 1307 in Cornwall, England Otto de Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1360 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Champernon è nata il nel 1289 nel Ilfracombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Champernon, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Joan de Ferrers, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Otto de Bodrugan nel 1307, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 gennaio 1360, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Champernonが1289年にイギリスイギリスデボンイルフラコンベで生まれた時，父William Champernonは60歳，母Joan de Ferrersは36歳であった。1307年にイギリスコルンワルでOtto de Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年1月7日に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Champernon(이)가 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이프라코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Champernon(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1307년 영국 코른월에서 Otto de Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 1월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Champernon nasceu em 1289, em Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Champernon, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto de Bodrugan em 1307, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1360, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Champernon родилась в 1289 г. в местности илфракомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Champernon было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto de Bodrugan в 1307 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 января 1360 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Champernon nació en 1289, en Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Champernon, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Otto de Bodrugan en 1307, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1360, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
